scenarios.description: children() after cache build and structural change should invalidate cache and rebuild filtered list
scenarios.precondition: Element el has one Element child, shadowChildrenRef populated
scenarios.expectedResult: second children() call returns updated list with two Element children
pseudocode: TEST TC05 children cache invalidation on nodelistChanged
// structural change triggers nodelistChanged and clears shadowChildrenRef

scenarios.description: children() when shadowChildrenRef exists but referent was GCed should rebuild filtered list
scenarios.precondition: Element el has two Element children and a synthetic cleared WeakReference
scenarios.expectedResult: children() returns list of both Element children after detecting null referent
pseudocode: TEST TC06 children rebuild when weakref cleared
// simulate GC clearing: assign shadowChildrenRef to new WeakReference<>(null) via reflection
